---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new table variant, workload, metric, or tooling improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what experiment does it unlock?

## Proposal

Describe the desired change. If it adds a new hash table variant, state the
concurrency strategy and the expected tradeoffs.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why they were rejected.

## Scope / non-goals

What is explicitly out of scope for this request.
